form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (25.46) at this track over 450m. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (25.46) at this track over 450m. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out entering the front straight and bumped.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (20.54) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (20.54) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Top-three aspirations.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled out of the boxes, losing valuable ground.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 450m at this track. Others favoured this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 450m at this track. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (25.61) at this track over 450m. Capable of a strong show.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (25.61) at this track over 450m. Capable of a strong show.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels leaving the first turn and lost vital ground.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.25 lengths in 20.15, beating Robell Seth. Last start finished 4th over 350m at this track beaten 6 lengths (20.51) behind Lollipop Valley in a Grade 5 on April 5. Looks up against it this time.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Mr. Einstein at this track last start over 450m (25.61). Right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Mr. Einstein at this track last start over 450m (25.61). Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Won his last couple, most recently at this track on April 12 over 450m in 25.33. Not suited by the wide draw; Likely to find this a bit tough.
